title: Lamb Leg with Crisp Topping
description: A flavorful lamb leg dish topped with a crunchy, sour topping. Perfect for a weekend dinner.
instructions: Season the lamb leg with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb leg until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast the lamb for 20 minutes.
While the lamb is cooking, mix the sour cream, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Stir in the chopped parsley and crisp.
After the lamb has cooked for 20 minutes, brush the sour cream mixture evenly over the top.
Return the pan to the oven and continue cooking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the lamb reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
